data_source: AI-Estimated (Llama 3.3 70B inference from web context — not official statistics)

exporters.ownership_note: State-owned and private companies, including PTValeIndonesia
exporters.notes: Indonesia accounts for 51% of global nickel mine production and has banned exports of unprocessed nickel ore since 2020.
China financed and built Indonesia's nickel industry, transforming the country into the world's largest producer in a decade.
Vale halted its operations in Indonesia, affecting nickel exports.
Australia's nickel production is affected by Indonesia's ban on exports of unprocessed nickel ore.

importers.notes: China is a major consumer of nickel and has invested heavily in Indonesia's nickel industry.
Japan is a significant importer of nickel and has a strong demand for nickel-based products.
South Korea is a major importer of nickel and has a growing demand for nickel-based products.
The European Union is a significant importer of nickel and has a growing demand for nickel-based products, particularly for electric vehicle batteries.
